action: Retrospective P2 (F2): bind audit PASS verdicts to tree-SHA via the existing step-5 provenance headers {cycle, phase, tree_sha, inputs_digest}. Ship accepts a tree whose SHA matches a recorded audited verdict without re-running the full pipeline (fast re-land path). Evidence: cycles 247-248 re-ran ~50-minute pipelines to re-land bit-identical content cycle 246 had already audited; the operator P0 re-land proved content-parity manually (diffstat match). Acceptance: a re-land cycle whose worktree tree-SHA equals an audited verdict's tree_sha skips tdd/build/audit and goes to ship with the prior verdict cross-referenced.
